creator: eric.douzet@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

With a new installation, impossible to compile :

ruby-1.9.3.484_1,1

ruby19-bdb-0.6.6_3

portupgrade-2.4.12,2

The db41-4.1.25_4 dependence is bad for portupgrade.


When portmaster ports-mgmt/portupgrade it works, it's good and practice...


Best regards,

Eric Douzet
